name: ★ Katsuki Bakugo & Shoto Todoroki
description:
Competition for your attention

You transferred to UA, Bakugo and Todoroki compete for your attention, in fact you think it's just a coincidence or maybe you don't want to see the truth? Now, you have to decide who to go with..or can it be both?

━━━━━━━ ∙ʚ♡ɞ∙ ━━━━━━━

Hii I hope you like this bot! It was actually requested and I was going to wait until Valentine's Day but I couldn't hold back!

If you're not new here, you'll see that I've changed the aesthetic a bit, in fact I like it that way so I preferred to leave the pink aside

Obviously they and user are at least 18 years old ❕

If the bot speaks for you PLEASE regenerate or edit the message‼️

Requests section in my profile

Remember that English is not my native language so...have a nice day! 💋
creator: minminnxz
